zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Moéls於大約1195年出生在英國英格蘭戴文卡德波利時，他的父親Roger Meulles (2 Sons)32歲，母親Roesia21歲。他於大約1224年與Hawise de Newmarch在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1194年住在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。他於1243年登記服兵役。他於1263年被列為had charge of of corfe castle。他去世於大約1264年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾沃特林頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Moéls于大约1195年出生在英国英格兰戴文卡德波利时，他的父亲Roger Meulles (2 Sons)32岁，母亲Roesia21岁。他于大约1224年与Hawise de Newmarch在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1194年住在英国英格兰薩默塞特。他于1243年登记服兵役。他于1263年被列为had charge of of corfe castle。他去世于大约1264年在英国英格兰奧可福爾沃特林頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moéls
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Moéls was born about 1195, in Cadbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Meulles (2 Sons), was 32 and his mother, Roesia, was 21. He married Hawise de Newmarch about 1224, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Somerset, England, United Kingdom in 1194. He registered for military service in 1243. In 1263, at the age of 69, his occupation is listed as had charge of of corfe castle. He died about 1264, in Watlington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Moéls est né environ 1195, à Cadbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Meulles (2 Sons), avait 32 ans et sa mère, Roesia, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Newmarch environ 1224, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1194. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1243. En 1263, à l’âge de 69 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est had charge of of corfe castle. Il est décédé environ 1264, à Watlington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Moéls um 1195 in Cadbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Meulles (2 Sons) 32 und seine Mutter Roesia 21. Er hat um 1224 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Hawise de Newmarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1194 hat er in Somerset, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er hat sich 1243 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1263, als er 69 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als had charge of of corfe castle aufgeführt. Er starb um 1264 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Watlington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Moéls è nato il circa 1195 nel Cadbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Meulles (2 Sons), aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Roesia, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Newmarch circa 1224, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1194. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1243. Nel 1263, all'età di 69 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come had charge of of corfe castle. Morì circa 1264, nel Watlington, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Moélsが約1195年にイギリスイギリスデボンカドブリーで生まれた時，父Roger Meulles (2 Sons)は32歳，母Roesiaは21歳であった。約1224年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでHawise de Newmarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年にはイギリスイギリスソメルセトに住んでいた。彼は1243年に兵役登録をした。1263年，69歳の時，職業はhad charge of of corfe castleと記録されている。彼は約1264年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワトリントンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Moéls(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 카드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Meulles (2 Sons)(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Roesia(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Hawise de Newmarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1194년도에 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 살았다. 그는 1243년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1263년, 69세의 나이로 그의 직업은 had charge of of corfe castle이었다. 그는 대략 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 왓링턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Moéls nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Cadbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Meulles (2 Sons), tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Roesia, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Newmarch aproximadamente 1224, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1194. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1243. Em 1263, com 69 anos, sua profissão aparece como had charge of of corfe castle. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1264, em Watlington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Moéls родился около 1195 г. в местности кадбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Meulles (2 Sons) было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Roesia, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Newmarch около 1224 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в 1194 году. В 1243 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1263 году, в возрасте 69 лет, работал по профессии had charge of of corfe castle. Он умер около 1264 г. в местности ватлингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Moéls nació aproximadamente 1195, en Cadbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Meulles (2 Sons), tenía 32 años y su mamá, Roesia, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hawise de Newmarch aproximadamente 1224, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1194. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1243. En 1263, a la edad de 69 años, su ocupación registrada era had charge of of corfe castle. Murió aproximadamente 1264, en Watlington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
